meaning: n.生于谷类,面粉中的甲虫之幼虫
examples: At one end, near a grandfather clock, sat two plates of mealworm Fried rice.
Both, like Peters's chicken-mealworm meatballs, await approval for sale across the European Union.
Dr Foellmer and Dr Fairbairn cite a peculiar instance of a male spider that died after mistakenly inserting his second pedipalp into the carcass of a mealworm.
But by sacrificing himself to ward off other amorous males (even when his mate is nothing but a dead mealworm), he certainly makes sure that it is his best shot.
